name: 14" Baby Doll Christmas Morning Outfit - Gigglescape™: Holiday Theme, Polyester, Fits 14-Inch Doll, 11 Pieces
description:
This 11-Piece Holiday Doll Costume from Gigglescape™ makes a perfect Christmas gift for your child. This doll costume includes a short-sleeve pullover T-shirt and pajama pants adorned with Christmas-themed prints plus a red Santa hat, pair of slippers, paper gift box, plush polar bear, milk bottle, plastic bottle, and two plastic cookies. Designed to fit 14-inch dolls, it gives them fun and festive new options for imaginative play.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
